title: KidPlay Toys Pretend Cash Register with Play Money and Groceries
description:
Ready set shop! This multi functional cash register is perfect for teaching your child basic math and money counting skills, while allowing them pretend play they are at a real supermarket. Cash Register has all of the elements of being a real cashier including a movable conveyor belt, working cash drawer, card swiper, barcode scanner, intercom speaker, and microphone. For pretend shopping this set includes a basket with grocery items and play credit card so your child can mimic your grocery shopping at home. Cash register include calculator so you child can add up their purchases. Play money is part of this set which will help your child to learn basic addition, subtraction, and cash handling skills.
